steps.title: Use two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit slopes downward, so the slope must be negative. Two clear points on the line are approximately $(0,12)$ and $(8,6)$.

steps.title: Match the closest value
steps.content: The closest answer choice to $-0.75$ is $-0.73$. The positive choices have the wrong sign, and $-12.14$ is much too steep. C is correct.
